purpur_craft.title: Craft Purpur Blocks, Purpur Pillars, and End Stone Bricks — the End's primary building palette

end_rod_craft.title: Craft 8 End Rods — the End's native light source, required for authentic End-tier builds

subtitle.text: The End Cities were built from Purpur. The material is the architecture is the civilization. Use it accordingly.

description: CH.13 · PURPUR AND END STONE
▸ Every End City was built from two materials.
Purpur Block — made from Popped Chorus Fruit.
End Stone Brick — cut from the dimension itself.
The End Rod holds it all in light.
This is the complete End building palette.
If you are building here, you build in this language.
◈ PURPUR CRAFTING
└ Purpur Block: 4 Popped Chorus Fruit (2×2 craft)
└ Purpur Pillar: 2 Purpur Slabs stacked
└ Purpur Stairs: 6 Purpur Blocks (standard stair recipe)
└ Purpur Slab: 3 Purpur Blocks in a row
└ All variants: crafted from base Purpur Block
Stonecutter: converts Purpur into all variants cleanly
(more efficient than crafting table for small quantities)
◈ END STONE BRICKS
└ End Stone Brick: 4 End Stone (2×2 craft)
└ End Stone Brick variants: Slab, Stairs, Wall
All via Stonecutter from End Stone Brick
└ End Stone source: mine directly from outer island floors
└ Fortune III pickaxe: no benefit (not a drop-affected block)
└ Silk Touch: picks up exact block (same result either way)
◈ END ROD
└ End Rod: 1 Blaze Rod + 1 Popped Chorus Fruit (vertical)
└ Light level 14: same as torch
└ Unique property: can be placed in any direction
(sideways, upside down, floor, ceiling — any axis)
└ End City aesthetic: End Rods are the canonical lamp
└ Build farms with End Rods as lighting — fire-proof,
mob-proof (level 14 suppresses all spawns within 7 blocks)
▸ The cities used only what the dimension grew.
Popped Chorus made the walls.
End Stone made the foundations.
They did not import building materials.
They built entirely from what was already there.
That discipline is why the cities are still standing
after the civilization that built them is not.
▶ Craft Purpur Blocks, Pillars, and End Stone Bricks [check]
▶ Craft 8 End Rods [check]
▶ Collect 32 Purpur Blocks
◇ End Stone Brick is aesthetically superior to raw End Stone
for base building — same durability, cleaner texture.
Purpur + End Stone Brick + End Rod is the complete palette.
Use this for any End-dimension outpost or farm structure.
